change_summary: Append-only, tenant-scoped audit log for authentication events (login, reset, lockout) with immutable rows.
critical_invariants: Audit rows are append-only: no update or delete path exists for a recorded event.
Every audit row is scoped to a tenant and carries actor, action, and UTC timestamp.
Reads are always filtered by tenant_id; cross-tenant reads are impossible.
requirement_closure: Ticket ask: Append-only audit log for authentication events scoped to tenant (FR-1.3).
Implemented: auditLog service with insert-only writes, tenant-scoped reads, structured action enum; unit tests cover append-only enforcement and tenant isolation.
Deferred to: retention/rotation tracked by DOCS-401
repo_gates: cd backend && npm run build [result=pass; attribution=clean] - tsc clean
cd backend && npm test -- auditLog [result=pass; attribution=clean] - 14 passed

self_review_cycles.findings: schema rejects update/delete; tenant_id non-null and indexed; tests assert append-only
reads filtered by tenant_id; no credential material stored; isolation test passes
index on (tenant_id, created_at) added in PERF-301; growth covered by retention doc
every FR-1.3 clause mapped to code + test; closeout complete
